name: Chicken Bolognese
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chicken broth or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pound the chicken breasts between 2 sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap until flattened. Remove the paper.
3. Sprinkle the chicken breasts with salt and pepper. Dredge in the flour; shake off excess.
4. In a heavy large skillet, melt the butter with the oil over moderate heat. Brown the chicken about 2 minutes per side or until light golden color. Transfer to a shallow buttered baking dish.
5. Place a slice of prosciutto and a slice of fontina cheese on each chicken breast. Sprinkle with Parmesan and drizzle with broth.
6. Bake, uncovered, in the 350°F oven for 10 to 20 minutes or until cheese is melted and lightly browned and chicken is no longer pink. Serve immediately.
